# News → Prophecy Map
*Auto-generated current events mapped to biblical prophecy*

> **How this file is updated:**
> Run `python3 scripts/news_prophecy_mapper.py` to fetch current news and map it to Scripture.
> For automated daily updates (Linux/Mac):
> ```bash
> crontab -e
> # Add: 0 7 * * * cd /path/to/Bible-MD-Files && python3 scripts/news_prophecy_mapper.py
> ```
>
> **Hermeneutical note:** The presence of news that matches prophetic patterns does NOT mean
> these prophecies are being fulfilled right now. Infrastructure and precursor conditions may
> exist for years before actual fulfillment. This tool is for theological awareness, not date-setting.

> **Cross-reference:** [[PROPHECY_FULFILLMENT_INDEX]] · [[COVENANT_INDEX]] · [[_VAULT_HOME]]
> **Dataview queries:** [[templates/DATAVIEW_QUERIES#section-5-current-events--news-queries|Q16–Q18]]

## MARCH 2026 — VERIFIED EVENTS LOG

> **Forensic Standard:** Every event below is documented from named sources. The scriptural column cites only the Bible's own text. No event is labeled "fulfillment" — the text records the structural match and lets the reader see it. Date-setting is not the function of this file.

---

### EVENT 1 — Board of Peace Established
**Date:** January 22, 2026
**Source:** [White House](https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/2026/01/president-trump-ratifies-board-of-peace-in-historic-ceremony-opening-path-to-hope-and-dignity-for-gazans/) · [Al Jazeera](https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/1/22/trump-launches-board-of-peace-at-ceremony-in-davos) · [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Board_of_Peace)

**What Happened:**
President Donald Trump ratified the Charter of the Board of Peace at a ceremony in Davos, Switzerland. 20+ nations signed. Key structural facts from the charter:
- Trump is named Chairman with no term limit; replacement requires unanimous vote of the Executive Board
- Membership requires a $1 billion financial commitment
- Scope has expanded beyond Gaza — the charter does not mention Gaza once; it covers any global conflict zone
- It operates parallel to and independent of the United Nations
- Trump's chairmanship is explicitly independent of his U.S. presidency

**Scriptural Structural Match:**

| Scripture | Text (KJV) | Structural Parallel |
|-----------|-----------|-------------------|
| Dan 9:27 | *"he shall confirm the covenant with many for one week"* | An international covenant signed by "many" nations, with a single figure as permanent authority |
| Dan 8:25 | *"by peace shall destroy many"* | "Peace" as the stated mechanism; the instrument is named "Board of Peace" |
| 1 Thess 5:3 | *"when they shall say, Peace and safety; then sudden destruction cometh upon them"* | The formal proclamation of a global "Peace" institution — the text does not say peace arrives; it says the declaration precedes destruction |
| Rev 13:7 | *"power was given him over all kindreds, and tongues, and nations"* | A body with declared authority to stabilize any nation on earth, funded by nations paying for access |

**Forensic Note:** The text does not say who chairs the body described in Daniel 9:27. It says a single figure confirms a covenant with many. The structural match is: (1) a covenant (charter), (2) with many nations, (3) under a single named authority, (4) centered on "peace." The Bible's own word for this kind of arrangement is a *berith* — a binding agreement. Record the match; do not name the fulfillment.

---

### EVENT 2 — Project Vault: U.S. Strategic Critical Minerals Reserve
**Date:** February 2, 2026
**Source:** [EXIM.gov](https://www.exim.gov/news/project-vault) · [CNBC](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/02/03/trump-stockpile-critical-minerals-reserve-project-vault.html) · [CSIS](https://www.csis.org/analysis/project-vault-pillar-economic-security)

**What Happened:**
The Export-Import Bank of the United States approved a $10 billion loan (largest in its 92-year history) plus $2 billion in private capital to create a stockpile of all 60 minerals on the U.S. Geological Survey Critical Minerals List — lithium, cobalt, gallium, germanium, rare earths, antimony, and others. Stated objective: lock in supply and cut rivals (specifically China) out of access.

**Scriptural Structural Match:**

| Scripture | Text (KJV) | Structural Parallel |
|-----------|-----------|-------------------|
| Rev 18:11–12 | *"the merchants of the earth shall weep and mourn over her; for no man buyeth their merchandise any more: The merchandise of gold, and silver, and precious stones..."* | A single administrative power controls the store of "precious things" — when it falls, the merchants of the earth have nowhere to sell |
| Dan 11:43 | *"he shall have power over the treasures of gold and of silver, and over all the precious things of Egypt"* | The text uses "precious things" (Hebrew: *machmad*) — desirable, valuable commodities — as what the final world power controls |
| Ezek 38:12–13 | *"to take a spoil...to take a prey; to carry away silver and gold, to take away cattle and goods, to take a great spoil"* | Gog's stated motive for invading Israel is resource acquisition — the text names this as what drives the final coalition against God's people |

**Forensic Note:** The Bible does not use the word "lithium." It uses "precious things," "gold," "silver," and "merchandise." The structural match is a single power locking up the store of the earth's desirable commodities so that no rival can buy or sell them. The mechanism described in Revelation 18 is economic strangulation of the merchants of the earth by one dominant system. Record the match.

---

### EVENT 3 — Santa Ynez Pipeline: Defense Production Act Invoked
**Date:** March 13, 2026
**Source:** [CalMatters](https://calmatters.org/environment/2026/03/trump-emergency-sable-santa-barbara/) · [Fox Business](https://www.foxbusiness.com/economy/trump-admin-invokes-defense-production-act-directs-oil-company-restart-california-operations)

**What Happened:**
The Trump administration invoked the Defense Production Act — a wartime emergency law, used for the first time in U.S. history to compel an oil company to resume production from idled infrastructure — to restart the Santa Ynez offshore oil platform and pipeline. Stated reason: supply disruption from the Iran conflict. California ordered the company to stop; the federal government ordered it to proceed. Sable Offshore began pumping oil.

**Scriptural Structural Match:**

| Scripture | Text (KJV) | Structural Parallel |
|-----------|-----------|-------------------|
| Rev 6:5–6 | *"And I beheld, and lo a black horse; and he that sat on him had a pair of balances in his hand. And I heard a voice...say, A measure of wheat for a penny, and three measures of barley for a penny; and see thou hurt not the oil and the wine."* | The third seal describes controlled rationing of food and commodities — the balances represent measured distribution; energy (oil) is specifically named as protected/controlled |
| Dan 11:39 | *"he shall...divide the land for gain"* | Federal override of state authority to extract resources — land divided for economic/military advantage |
| Isa 10:13–14 | *"I have robbed their treasures, and I have put down the inhabitants like a valiant man: And my hand hath found as a nest the riches of the people: and as one gathereth eggs that are left, have I gathered all the earth"* | The pattern of a power that gathers the earth's resources as eggs from a nest — the text describes consolidation of resource control as the fingerprint of the figure described |

**Forensic Note:** The Iran war connection is the stated reason for this action. Ezekiel 38:5 names "Persia" — the historical name for Iran — in the Gog-Magog coalition. The U.S. is currently at war with Iran. The pipeline restart is directly tied to the energy disruptions caused by that war. The text connects Persia/Iran to the final resource conflict.

---

### EVENT 4 — Farm, Food, and National Security Act of 2026
**Date:** Advanced by House Agriculture Committee, March 5, 2026
**Source:** [Congress.gov H.R.7567](https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/7567) · [NACO](https://www.naco.org/news/house-agriculture-committee-introduces-2026-farm-bill)

**What Happened:**
The House Agriculture Committee advanced H.R. 7567, the Farm, Food, and National Security Act of 2026, with a bipartisan vote of 34–17. The bill's title formally reclassifies food security as national security, enabling emergency powers to be applied to the food supply, fertilizer access, and farmland use.

**Scriptural Structural Match:**

| Scripture | Text (KJV) | Structural Parallel |
|-----------|-----------|-------------------|
| Rev 6:5–6 | *"A measure of wheat for a penny, and three measures of barley for a penny"* | Controlled, rationed distribution of food at administered prices — the balances represent government measurement and control of food |
| Rev 13:17 | *"that no man might buy or sell, save he that had the mark"* | Buy/sell access controlled by compliance with the system — food is the most basic commodity in this chain |
| Lev 26:26 | *"when I have broken the staff of your bread, ten women shall bake your bread in one oven, and they shall deliver you your bread again by weight: and ye shall eat, and not be satisfied"* | Bread rationed by weight — the covenantal warning of what happens when God removes blessing from a nation's food system |

**Forensic Note:** The bill itself is infrastructure — it creates the legal mechanism for food emergency powers. The text does not require this specific bill to be the fulfillment; it requires a system where food access is subject to compliance conditions. This bill builds that legal architecture.

---

### EVENT 5 — U.S. Military Operations Against Iran; Cuba "Next"
**Date:** Ongoing war with Iran; Cuba threat stated March 16, 2026
**Source:** [Al Jazeera](https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/3/16/cuba-electric-grid-collapses-amid-us-oil-blockade-causing-national-blackout) · [Washington Post](https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/2026/03/16/cuba-blackout-energy-grid-collapse/) · [CNBC](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/10/iran-war-cuba-crisis-fuel-energy-trump-us-havana.html)

**What Happened:**
The U.S. is currently in active military operations against Iran (into its third week as of March 16, 2026). The oil blockade of Cuba has caused a total collapse of Cuba's national power grid — 10 million people without electricity. Trump stated publicly: *"Whether I free it, take it, I think I can do anything I want with it."* Senator Lindsey Graham stated: "Cuba's next." Secretary of State Rubio stated the objective is "regime change."

**Scriptural Structural Match:**

| Scripture | Text (KJV) | Structural Parallel |
|-----------|-----------|-------------------|
| Ezek 38:5 | *"Persia, Ethiopia, and Libya with them"* | Persia = Iran (the name "Persia" was the official name of Iran until 1935; both names remain in use). The Gog-Magog coalition specifically names Iran as a key member. The U.S. is now at direct war with this named nation |
| Dan 11:40–43 | *"the king of the south...and he shall enter into the countries, and shall overflow and pass over. He shall enter also into the glorious land...he shall stretch forth his hand also upon the countries"* | Sequential conquest or forced submission of nations — the text describes a power that moves from one country to the next |
| Isa 13:17–19 | *"Behold, I will stir up the Medes against them...And Babylon, the glory of kingdoms...shall be as when God overthrew Sodom and Gomorrah"* | The destruction of Babylon (the system centered on the Euphrates region — modern Iraq/Iran) by a northern/western power is described in detail by Isaiah |
| Rev 16:12 | *"And the sixth angel poured out his vial upon the great river Euphrates; and the water thereof was dried up, that the way of the kings of the east might be prepared"* | The Euphrates runs through Iran and Iraq — military dominance of this region is the textual precondition for the eastern kings moving. An energy blockade and war in this exact geography is the structural match |

**Forensic Note:** The Bible identifies Iran by its ancient name Persia (Ezek 38:5; Dan 8:20; Dan 10:13). This is not interpretation — it is the Bible's own geographic label for the nation currently at war with the United States.

### EVENT 6 — Pope Leo XIV to Receive Liberty Medal, July 3, 2026
**Date:** Announced March 16, 2026; ceremony July 3, 2026
**Source:** [National Constitution Center](https://constitutioncenter.org/about/press-room/press-releases/pope-leo-xiv-to-receive-national-constitution-centers-38th-annual-liberty-medal) · [America Magazine](https://www.americamagazine.org/vatican-dispatch/2026/03/16/pope-leo-to-accept-liberty-medal-and-address-americans-on-july-3/)

**What Happened:**
The National Constitution Center announced that Pope Leo XIV — born Robert Francis Prevost in Chicago, Illinois; elected Pope in May 2025; first U.S.-born Pope — will receive the Liberty Medal on July 3, 2026, on Independence Mall in Philadelphia, broadcast live globally via Comcast/NBCUniversal. The award is for "freedom of conscience." The ceremony falls one day before America's 250th anniversary celebration.

**Scriptural Structural Match:**

| Scripture | Text (KJV) | Structural Parallel |
|-----------|-----------|-------------------|
| Rev 13:11–12 | *"And I beheld another beast coming up out of the earth; and he had two horns like a lamb, and he spake as a dragon. And he exerciseth all the power of the first beast before him, and causeth the earth and them which dwell therein to worship the first beast"* | A figure who appears gentle ("like a lamb") but whose speech serves the power structure — the structural pattern is a religious authority who validates a political/economic power to the nations of the earth |
| Dan 3:4–5 | *"Then an herald cried aloud, To you it is commanded, O people, nations, and languages, That at what time ye hear the sound...ye fall down and worship"* | A global broadcast ceremony commanding nations to witness a unified political-religious event — the text describes exactly this kind of orchestrated, globally broadcast act of homage |
| Rev 17:18 | *"And the woman which thou sawest is that great city, which reigneth over the kings of the earth"* | A city that exercises religious/political authority over the kings of the earth — the Vatican city-state exercises diplomatic relations with virtually every nation on earth |

**Forensic Note:** The Bible does not say "the Pope is the False Prophet." What the text in Revelation 13:11–12 describes is a structural role: a religious figure who uses the language of peace and conscience ("like a lamb") while exercising authority that validates and empowers the dominant political-economic system. The observation here is structural: on July 3, 2026 — the eve of the 250th anniversary of the nation that chairs the Board of Peace, controls Project Vault, and is conducting military operations across the Middle East — a global religious broadcast will provide a "freedom of conscience" moral seal to that moment. Record the structure. The text will interpret it.

No person is declared a biblical figure. The text identifies patterns — the reader observes the match. *"Surely the Lord GOD does nothing, unless He reveals His secret to His servants the prophets."* — Amos 3:7
